docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, YURI AS TO DEFENDANT CARIAS, VANESSA , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
